title: Miconia vazquezii
taxonomy: Miconia vazquezii is a species of flowering plant in the family Melastomataceae. It belongs to the genus Miconia, a group of plants commonly known as the "ochna" or "melastome". The classification of Miconia vazquezii places it within the order Myrtales and the clade Rosidae. This classification suggests that Miconia vazquezii shares common ancestors with other plants in the same order and clade. As a result, Miconia vazquezii's classification is an important part of its taxonomic identity.
